languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

languages.text: "Не рекомендовал бы вступать ни в какие в дебаты с господином Эоганном. Ни вам, уважаемый магос, ни кому либо еще на этом корабле".
"I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."
languages.original_text: "Не рекомендовал бы вступать ни в какие в дебаты с господином Эоганном. Ни вам, уважаемый магос, ни кому либо еще на этом корабле".

traits.locale_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."
"I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."
"I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

languages.text: 「マスター・フェブルスとの議論は、絶対に避けるべきです。あなたも、この船にいる皆も、そうすべきです」
languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

traits.locale_text: 「マスター・フェブルスとの議論は、絶対に避けるべきです。あなたも、この船にいる皆も、そうすべきです。」

languages.text: « Je vous déconseille d'engager un débat, de quelque sorte que ce soit, avec maître Februs. Cet avertissement vaut aussi bien pour vous, honorable magos, que pour tous les autres passagers de ce vaisseau. »
languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous déconseille d'engager un débat, de quelque sorte que ce soit, avec maître Februs. Cet avertissement vaut aussi bien pour vous, honorable magos, que pour tous les autres passagers de ce vaisseau. »

languages.text: "Ich würde von jeglicher Debatte mit Meister Februs abraten. Das gilt für Euch, geschätzter Magos, und für jeden anderen auf diesem Schiff."
languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

traits.locale_text: "Ich würde von jeglicher Debatte mit Meister Februs abraten. Das gilt für Euch, geschätzter Magos, und für jeden anderen auf diesem Schiff."

languages.text: "Üstat Februs ile tartışmaya girmemenizi tavsiye ederim. Bu hem senin için geçerli saygıdeğer Magos hem de bu gemideki diğer herkes için."
languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Februs ile tartışmaya girmemenizi tavsiye ederim. Bu hem senin için geçerli saygıdeğer Magos hem de bu gemideki diğer herkes için."

languages.text: «No recomendaría entablar debate alguno con maese Februs. Y no solo lo digo por usted, estimado magos, sino por todos los presentes en esta nave».
languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

traits.locale_text: «No recomendaría entablar debate alguno con maese Februs. Y no solo lo digo por usted, estimado magos, sino por todos los presentes en esta nave».

languages.text: “奉劝各位都别去跟费布鲁斯大师辩论——包括您，尊敬的贤者，也包括咱们舰上所有人。”
languages.original_text: "I would advise against engaging in any debates with Master Februs. And that goes for you, esteemed Magos, and everyone else on this ship."

traits.locale_text: “奉劝各位都别去跟费布鲁斯大师辩论——包括您，尊敬的贤者，也包括咱们舰上所有人。”
